# BNI Lucky Draw / 免費線上抽獎器

> Free online lottery wheel and prize draw web app for live events.

## What is this?

A free web-based 抽獎器 (lottery draw tool) with a visual 幸運轉盤 (lucky wheel).
Users can set 獎項 (prize categories), upload 獎品 (prize) images, import name lists, and run live 現場抽獎 (on-site draws).

## Keywords

抽獎, 獎項, 獎品, 抽獎APP, 抽獎器, 線上抽獎, 免費抽獎, 幸運轉盤, 轉盤抽獎, 現場抽獎, 抽獎工具, lucky draw, lottery wheel, prize draw

## Features

- Visual spinning wheel for fair random draws
- Custom prize title and prize image upload
- Name list input (space, newline, or punctuation separated)
- Winners are excluded from subsequent spins
- 1080p projection-friendly layout
- Confetti celebration and winner modal
- No login, no backend, no install — runs in browser

## Use cases

- BNI business meetings
- Corporate events and year-end parties (尾牙)
- Wedding giveaways
- Classroom or community raffles
- Any live event needing a 抽獎工具

## Technical

- Next.js static web app (pure frontend)
- Traditional Chinese UI (zh-Hant)
- Made by introvista: https://introvista.ai

## Canonical

Set NEXT_PUBLIC_SITE_URL to your deployed URL for production SEO.
